0.text: Ground glass opacities in all segments of both lungs

1.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the mediobasal and anterobasal segments of the right lower lobe

2.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the laterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the lingular segment of the left lung

4.text: Nonspecific nodules measuring 4.5 mm in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe
